transcription.text: The sweet-handling Mustang II Cobras. No other domestic car in its class gives you all this standard. Spoilers, stabilizer bars, staggered shocks, rack and pinion steering, steel-belted radials, and four on the floor. That's why Cobra takes the curves like a snake. The sweet-handling car, Mustang II, put one between the road and you. When America needs a better idea, Ford puts it on wheels.
